dashboard.title: Forms Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Select a form or create a new one.

formDetail.title: Form Details
formDetail.noSubmission: Responses have not been submitted yet.

forms.title: Forms
forms.subtitle: {total} forms · {completed} completed
forms.emptyDesc: Create the first one to start.

deleteModal.title: Delete form?
deleteModal.desc: This will permanently delete the form for {clientName} and all its responses. This action cannot be undone.

intro.title: Tell us about your project.
intro.description: We want to deeply understand your project so we can create a visual identity that truly resonates with you and your audience.
intro.duration: ~{minutes} minutes · Can only be submitted once

common.title: Who are you?
common.desc: The foundation of everything. No filters, no pitch.

q_company_one_liner.label: What does {clientName} do in one sentence?
q_company_one_liner.hint: Describe what you do, for whom, and what changes in their business after working with you.
q_company_one_liner.placeholder: Describe what you do, for whom, and what changes in their business after working with you.

q_company_why.label: Why does {clientName} exist? What was the origin?
q_company_why.hint: The origin, the frustration you spotted, the opportunity nobody was capturing.

q_business_stage.label: Where is {clientName} at today?
q_business_stage.hint: This helps us understand the real starting point and adapt the strategy to your current situation.

options.starting: Just starting out — less than 1 year offering my services
options.established: Been around a while — I have clients but want to grow or improve
options.struggling: Been around but haven't seen the results I expected
options.relaunching: Relaunching — I had operations before and I'm starting over

q_client_voice.label: What would a happy {clientName} client say when recommending you to a friend?
q_client_voice.hint: Write it as if they were speaking. 'I hired them because...' or 'What I loved most was...'
q_client_voice.placeholder: E.g.: I hired them because they were the only ones who truly understood the problem without me repeating myself. And they delivered exactly what they promised.

q_ideal_client.label: Who is the client you enjoy working with the most?
q_ideal_client.hint: Not the one who pays the most — the one who makes your work worthwhile. Industry, size, role, their biggest pain.
q_ideal_client.placeholder: E.g.: Mid-size manufacturing business owners, 50-200 employees, who know they need to change but don't know where to start. Decisive, with real budget.

q_differentiator.label: Why did a client who got quotes from competitors end up choosing you?
q_differentiator.hint: If you don't have that story yet, what do clients say made them stay or come back?
q_differentiator.placeholder: E.g.: They tell us we're the only ones who deliver on time and don't disappear after closing the deal. Competitors promised more but delivered less.

branding.title: Brand personality.
branding.desc: Let's define how {clientName} looks, sounds, and feels.

q_perception_rank.label: Which of these should be the first thing someone thinks when they see your brand?
q_perception_rank.hint: Rank from most to least important. #1 will guide every design decision.

q_visual_inspiration.label: What brand (from any industry) has the visual identity you admire most, and what makes it special?
q_visual_inspiration.hint: It doesn't have to be from your industry. It could be a craft beer, a digital bank, or a tech startup.
q_visual_inspiration.placeholder: E.g.: I like Notion because it's clean, unpretentious, and anyone can understand what it's for just by looking at it. It doesn't try to impress — it just works.

q_visual_avoid.label: Any brand or visual style you definitely DON'T want {clientName} to resemble?
q_visual_avoid.hint: Knowing what you don't want is just as valuable. Select any you'd avoid.

q_keep_elements.label: Are there current brand elements you want to keep?
q_keep_elements.hint: Current logo, color palette, typography, communication tone... anything that identifies {clientName} and should be preserved.

q_concrete_result.label: What is the most concrete, measurable result you deliver to a client?
q_concrete_result.hint: Not 'we improve your business.' What number changes, what process disappears, what problem never happens again?
q_concrete_result.placeholder: E.g.: Our clients cut their onboarding time from 3 weeks to 4 days. Or: We go from 0 to 50 qualified leads per month in the first 90 days.

q_tone_avoid.label: Is there any brand or communication style that makes you feel 'this is not for me'?
q_tone_avoid.hint: What makes you close a website or ignore a message? That's exactly what {clientName} should avoid.
q_tone_avoid.placeholder: E.g.: Brands that talk down to their customers. Or ones that use words like 'ecosystem', 'synergy', and 'disruption' without saying anything real.

q_never.label: What do you NEVER want {clientName} to be?
q_never.hint: No filters. What type of company, perception, or reputation would be a total failure for {clientName}?

web_current_site.label: Do you have an active website? If so, what bothers you most about it?
web_current_site.hint: URL if you have one. Be honest — what makes it not work as it should?
web_current_site.placeholder: E.g.: noctra.studio — the problem is nobody understands what we sell when they land. Or: We don't have a site yet.

web_type.label: What type of site do you need?

web_references.label: Websites you admire or inspire you?

web_content_owner.label: Who will be responsible for the website content (copy, images, messaging)?
web_content_owner.hint: This helps us plan the project realistically from the start.

web_features.label: What functionalities does the site need?

web_deadline.label: Do you have a deadline for the launch?

web_goal.label: What is the one action you want a visitor to take when they land on your site?
web_goal.hint: If you could only ask them for one thing, what would it be? Being specific here makes all the difference.
web_goal.placeholder: E.g.: Book a 30-minute diagnostic call. Not buy immediately — just take the first step.

seo.title: Organic visibility.
seo.desc: Let's define the strategy so {clientName} appears where it matters.

seo_current_site.label: Do you have an active website?

seo_target_keywords.label: When your ideal client has the problem you solve, what do they type into Google?
seo_target_keywords.hint: Think of the exact moment of pain, not your service. What phrase would they type at 11pm when they've had enough?
seo_target_keywords.placeholder: E.g.: 'how to automate invoicing small business', 'web design agency pricing', 'why my sales team can't close deals'

seo_geo.label: What geographic market do you want to reach?

seo_previous_attempts.label: Have you tried SEO before? What happened?
seo_previous_attempts.hint: If you have prior experience (good or bad), it helps us avoid repeating what didn't work.
seo_previous_attempts.placeholder: E.g.: We hired an agency for 6 months, paid for links, saw no results. Or: We've never formally tried it.

seo_current_traffic.label: Do you know how much organic traffic you currently receive?

seo_goal.label: What is the primary goal of SEO?

ai-automations.title: Automate what slows you down.
ai-automations.desc: Let's identify which processes at {clientName} can run themselves.

ai_current_tools.label: What tools does the team currently use?

ai_pain_points.label: What task does your team do that nobody would miss if it disappeared tomorrow — but they can't avoid doing it today?
ai_pain_points.hint: The work everyone hates but 'has to be done.' That's exactly what we want to automate first.
ai_pain_points.placeholder: E.g.: Copying data from emails into a spreadsheet. Or manually sending the same follow-up to every prospect 3 days after a call.

ai_processes.label: Which processes are you interested in automating?

ai_first_priority.label: If you could automate ONE thing this week, what would it be?
ai_first_priority.hint: The process causing the most pain right now. Even if it seems small.
ai_first_priority.placeholder: E.g.: Post-sale follow-up. We always forget it and lose clients because of that.

ai_team_size.label: How many people are on the team that would use the automations?

ai_tech_level.label: How would you describe the team's technical level?

ai_budget_range.label: Do you have a rough monthly budget in mind for tools and automation? (optional)
ai_budget_range.hint: Not a commitment. Helps us design a solution you can sustain long-term.

ai_timeline.label: In how much time do you need to see results?

crm.title: Your sales operation.
crm.desc: Let's understand how {clientName} manages its clients and sales today.

crm_current_crm.label: What do you currently use to manage clients and sales?

crm_pain_points.label: What problems does your current CRM or process have?

crm_team_size.label: How many people would use the CRM?

crm_pipeline.label: What is your sales process like today?

crm_avg_deals.label: About how many deals/leads do you handle per month?

crm_integrations.label: What tools does the CRM need to integrate with?

crm_ai_features.label: What AI features are you interested in for the CRM?

crm_main_goal.label: What is the #1 goal of implementing Forge?

contentOwner: We need Noctra to handle content
We have something but it needs work

alreadySubmitted.title: Form Submitted
alreadySubmitted.message: This Brand Discovery form has already been completed and submitted.

success.title: All Done!
success.message: We have received your responses successfully. We'll be in touch soon.

error.title: An error occurred
error.message: We couldn't submit your responses. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.

sent.title: Check your email.
sent.description: If {email} has an active account, you will receive the link in the next few minutes. Please check your spam folder.

resetPassword.title: New Password.
resetPassword.description: Choose a strong password. You cannot reuse the previous password.

expired.title: Link expired.
expired.description: This link is no longer valid. Links expire after 1 hour.

common.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this form? This action cannot be undone.
